01 — About

Background & Profile

A technically grounded engineer with real-world experience at one of the world's largest energy companies.

I graduated with a B.Sc. in Computer Engineering from King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals (KFUPM), building a strong foundation in networks, embedded systems, and secure system design.

During my internship at Saudi Aramco's Technical Support Unit, I worked on OT/IT network security — gaining experience with industrial switches, enterprise firewalls, SIEM platforms, and cybersecurity compliance.

I am registered with the Saudi Council of Engineers and am actively pursuing opportunities in cybersecurity, networking, and engineering across Saudi Arabia.

03 — Projects

Selected Work

🤖
Edge-AI Hand Tracking & Control System

Real-time hand tracking using ESP32-CAM with an on-device FOMO AI model. Achieved 95.2% detection accuracy on a custom grayscale dataset trained via Edge Impulse.

ESP32-CAM Edge Impulse Embedded AI C++
🅿️
Smart Parking System — Secure Cloud

AI-based parking detection with 93.3% accuracy. Integrated AWS IoT Core using MQTT over TLS and HTTPS for secure cloud communication and live monitoring.

AWS IoT Core MQTT / TLS ESP32 Cloud Security
🏢
IoT Smart Building Automation

Designed a multi-room IoT network with role-based access controls, security gateways, and rule-based automation for HVAC, lighting, and emergency systems.

Cisco Packet Tracer IoT RBAC Network Design
🚗
Smart OBD-II Predictive Maintenance System

An ESP32-S3 reads 22 live sensor values from the car's OBD-II port every 100ms via an MCP2515 CAN controller. An Edge Impulse ML model runs entirely on-device, classifying sensor patterns into 4 failure classes: engine overheating, battery degradation, high load stress, and normal. Every prediction and all sensor readings are sent directly to Firebase Firestore via REST API — no laptop required. A live web dashboard displays real-time sensor values, arc gauges, and ML predictions via Firebase's onSnapshot listener.

ESP32-S3 OBD-II / CAN Bus Edge Impulse ML Firebase Firestore Live Dashboard
